steps.title: Define May sales
steps.content: Let $S$ be the number of sales in May. April sales were $12$ more than $3$ times May sales, so April sales were $3S+12$.

steps.title: Use the total
steps.content: Together, April and May had $356$ sales: $S+(3S+12)=356$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: $4S+12=356$, so $4S=344$ and $S=86$. The dealer completed 86 sales in May.
